stemHtml: A multi-engine jet aeroplane is flying at its optimum cruise altitude when an engine fails. To minimise the angle of descent, the crew should descend at...

options.a: the speed for minimum power required, extending flaps to further increase the lift.
options.b: V<sub>MD </sub>minimum drag speed and optimise the angle of descent by increasing lift through the extension of flaps.
options.c: 1.32 V<sub>MD </sub>minimum drag speed and reduce weight by jettisoning fuel if possible and required.
options.d: the speed for L/DMAX maximum lift to drag ratio and reduce weight by jettisoning fuel if possible and required.
